gate_breakdown.primary_reason: Framework redesign atau policy retest belum difinalkan.
gate_breakdown.recommended_requirement: Finalkan framework redesign, segment policy, dan blok global promotion.

gate_breakdown.primary_reason: Distribusi news/sample masih terlalu tipis atau timpang untuk segment utama.
gate_breakdown.recommended_requirement: Ratakan coverage news/article days untuk primary segment atau ubah horizon label terlebih dulu.

gate_breakdown.primary_reason: History minimum, additional bars, dan OOS window per ticker belum cukup.
gate_breakdown.recommended_requirement: Perpanjang history sampai minimum 120 bar dan 3 usable OOS windows per ticker.

gate_breakdown.primary_reason: Coverage ticker yang benar-benar siap retest masih kurang merata.
gate_breakdown.recommended_requirement: Naikkan proporsi ticker yang benar-benar ready sebelum retest dibuka.

gate_breakdown.primary_reason: OOS support masih kecil atau terlalu terkonsentrasi pada ticker/fold tertentu.
gate_breakdown.recommended_requirement: Tambahkan sample OOS sampai trade dan konsentrasi fold/ticker memenuhi fairness threshold.

gate_breakdown.primary_reason: Roadmap discipline berubah dari status closeout yang sudah ditetapkan.
gate_breakdown.recommended_requirement: Pulihkan status roadmap ke Phase B closed dan Phase C tetap blocked.

active_blockers.impact: Median aligned news density across current universe after explicit density-policy alignment review.
active_blockers.recommended_fix: Tambah article-day coverage lintas universe sampai median news_density_pct >= 0.3252 sesuai threshold aktif yang sudah direalign.
active_blockers.gate_requirement: Ratakan coverage news/article days untuk primary segment atau ubah horizon label terlebih dulu.

active_blockers.impact: Overlap risk harus tidak high sebelum ada diskusi retry.
active_blockers.recommended_fix: Redesign filter tambahan sampai overlap risk tidak lagi high terhadap baseline aktif.
active_blockers.gate_requirement: Finalkan framework redesign, segment policy, dan blok global promotion.

active_blockers.impact: Signal sparsity/flatness harus lolos audit sebelum retest boleh dipertimbangkan.
active_blockers.recommended_fix: Perbaiki sparsity/flatness sinyal lewat redesign trade design dan label horizon sebelum retest.
active_blockers.gate_requirement: Finalkan framework redesign, segment policy, dan blok global promotion.

active_blockers.impact: Kandidat redesign harus lolos validation minimum sebelum dianggap usable.
active_blockers.recommended_fix: Ulang candidate validation setelah redesign/data extension sampai kandidat lolos validation minimum.
active_blockers.gate_requirement: Finalkan framework redesign, segment policy, dan blok global promotion.

active_blockers.impact: Retry strategi butuh keputusan resmi baru yang membuka ulang track eksperimen.
active_blockers.recommended_fix: Tetap hormati closeout resmi; jangan buka retry strategi sebelum ada keputusan resmi baru.
active_blockers.gate_requirement: Finalkan framework redesign, segment policy, dan blok global promotion.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Minimum history per ticker for fair retest.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Tambahkan history sampai semua ticker mencapai minimum 120 bar.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Perpanjang history sampai minimum 120 bar dan 3 usable OOS windows per ticker.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Additional bars beyond official baseline after policy realignment.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Tidak ada additional bar wajib di atas official baseline; threshold ini hanya memastikan basis history tidak di bawah source-of-truth OOS resmi.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Perpanjang history sampai minimum 120 bar dan 3 usable OOS windows per ticker.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Minimum usable OOS windows across tickers after methodology-aligned policy realignment.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Refresh phase_b_data_extension_audit; jika tetap fail setelah refresh, pastikan minimum 3 usable OOS windows tercapai sesuai kapasitas metodologi resmi.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Perpanjang history sampai minimum 120 bar dan 3 usable OOS windows per ticker.

all_threshold_checks.source_field: share of tickers with history_rows>=120 and usable_oos_windows>=6
all_threshold_checks.impact: Share of tickers already satisfying history + OOS window gate.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Naikkan proporsi ticker yang sudah memenuhi 120 bar dan 6 OOS windows.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Naikkan proporsi ticker yang benar-benar ready sebelum retest dibuka.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Primary segment breadth.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Perluas ticker yang lolos ke official primary segment hanya lewat perbaikan data/segment inputs yang sah, bukan override manual.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Naikkan proporsi ticker yang benar-benar ready sebelum retest dibuka.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Median aligned news density across current universe after explicit density-policy alignment review.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Tambah article-day coverage lintas universe sampai median news_density_pct >= 0.3252 sesuai threshold aktif yang sudah direalign.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Ratakan coverage news/article days untuk primary segment atau ubah horizon label terlebih dulu.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Total aligned articles in primary segment.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Tambah artikel berkualitas di official primary segment sampai total >= 18.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Ratakan coverage news/article days untuk primary segment atau ubah horizon label terlebih dulu.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Median article days across primary-segment tickers.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Tambah sebaran hari artikel di official primary segment sampai median >= 4.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Ratakan coverage news/article days untuk primary segment atau ubah horizon label terlebih dulu.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Single ticker should not dominate primary-segment article supply.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Rebalance coverage agar satu ticker tidak mendominasi supply artikel official primary segment.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Ratakan coverage news/article days untuk primary segment atau ubah horizon label terlebih dulu.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Primary segment minimum usable windows after methodology-aligned policy realignment.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Perpanjang history di seluruh official primary segment sampai minimum 3 windows konsisten sesuai metodologi resmi.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Tambahkan sample OOS sampai trade dan konsentrasi fold/ticker memenuhi fairness threshold.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Primary active ticker count in OOS.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Naikkan jumlah ticker aktif di OOS primary segment ke minimal 4.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Tambahkan sample OOS sampai trade dan konsentrasi fold/ticker memenuhi fairness threshold.

all_threshold_checks.impact: Primary segment total OOS trade sample.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Tambah history/coverage sampai total trade OOS primary segment mencapai minimal 18.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Tambahkan sample OOS sampai trade dan konsentrasi fold/ticker memenuhi fairness threshold.

all_threshold_checks.source_field: max ticker candidate_total_trades / total candidate_total_trades for sentiment_segment=sentiment_poor
all_threshold_checks.impact: Ticker concentration in primary OOS trades.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Ratakan trade contribution antar ticker di primary segment.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Tambahkan sample OOS sampai trade dan konsentrasi fold/ticker memenuhi fairness threshold.

all_threshold_checks.source_field: max fold candidate_total_trades / total candidate_total_trades for sentiment_segment=sentiment_poor
all_threshold_checks.impact: Fold concentration in primary OOS trades.
all_threshold_checks.recommended_fix: Perpanjang history lalu rerun OOS agar distribusi trade per fold tidak melebihi 50%.
all_threshold_checks.gate_requirement: Tambahkan sample OOS sampai trade dan konsentrasi fold/ticker memenuhi fairness threshold.
